chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1951 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application 23.10.2025 Mr. Ghulam Nabi Shar, Advocate for Applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh along with SIP-Muhammad Riaz of Police Station Qauaidabad District Malir Karachi ************ Learned Counsel for the Applicant submits that the Applicant has been convicted by the Trial Court in another case; hence, he does not press this Criminal Bail Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Qurban
